title: Mangaladevi Temple
tagline: Mangaladevi Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Mangaladevi Temple is a Hindu temple at Bolara in the city of Mangaluru in the Indian state of Karnataka.
overview.description: The Mangaladevi Temple is a Hindu temple at Bolara in the city of Mangaluru in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is situated about three kilometres southwest of the city centre. The temple is dedicated to the Hindu goddess Shakti in the form of Mangaladevi, the presiding deity from whom the city derives its name. The temple is of significant antiquity and is believed to have been built during the 9th century by Kundavarman, the most noted king of the Alupa dynasty, under the patronage of Matsyendranath.

topPlaces.name: Srinivas Group of Institutions
topPlaces.description: Srinivas Group of Institutions, formerly Srinivas Group of Colleges, runs educational institutes in and around Mangaluru, Karnataka, India. The Colleges are managed by A. Shama Rao Foundation, which is an Educational and Public Charitable Registered Trust.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Rosary Cathedral, Mangalore
topPlaces.description: Church of Our Lady of Rosary of Mangalore (Portuguese: Igreja Nossa Senhora do Rosário de Mangalore), or Rosario Cathedral is a Catholic cathedral in the Diocese of Mangalore, dedicated to Our Lady of the Rosary. It was the first Catholic church in the Kanara region.

image.alt: Our Lady of Rosary Cathedral, Mangalore

topPlaces.name: Fiza by Nexus
topPlaces.description: Fiza by Nexus is a shopping mall in Karnataka, located on Pandeshwar road in Mangaluru, India 1 km (0.62 mi) away from the Mangalore Central railway station. Popularly known as Nexus Mall, it opened to the public in May 2014.

topPlaces.name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Mangalore
topPlaces.description: The Diocese of Mangalore (Latin: Diocesis Mangalorensis) is a Latin Church ecclesiastical jurisdiction or diocese of the Catholic Church located in the city of Mangalore, India. The diocese is a suffragan in the ecclesiastical province of the metropolitan Archdiocese of Bangalore.

topPlaces.name: The Congregation of the Apostolic Carmel - Karnataka Province
topPlaces.description: The Congregation of the Apostolic Carmel - Karnataka Province is a Catholic women's congregation situated in Mangalore in the state of Karnataka, India. It was established in the year 1870 by three Catholic nuns from France of the order of Sisters of the Apostolic Carmel.

image.alt: The Congregation of the Apostolic Carmel - Karnataka Province

topPlaces.name: Gurupura River
topPlaces.description: The Gurupura River (also known as Pachamagaru River, Phalguni River or Kulur River) is a river in the Karnataka state of India. It originates in the Western Ghats and is a distributary of the Netravati River, which empties into the Arabian Sea, south of Mangalore.

topPlaces.name: St. Paul's Church, Mangalore
topPlaces.description: St. Paul's Church is an Anglican church in Mangalore, India.

topPlaces.name: Centre for Entrepreneurship Opportunities and Learning
topPlaces.description: Centre for Entrepreneurship Opportunities and Learning, commonly known as CEOL, is a startup incubation centre situated in Mangaluru city of Karnataka in India. It was launched by Nirmala Sitharaman in 2017.

image.alt: Centre for Entrepreneurship Opportunities and Learning

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mangaladevi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mangaladevi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mangaladevi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (13 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mangaladevi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mangaladevi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mangaladevi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mangaladevi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mangaladevi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Srinivas Group of Institutions, Our Lady of Rosary Cathedral, Mangalore, Fiza by Nexus, Roman Catholic Diocese of Mangalore, The Congregation of the Apostolic Carmel - Karnataka Province.
